title: pseudostelis deregularis
intro: Pseudostelis deregularis, also known as the pseudostelis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The pseudostelis plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the pseudostelis plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic to prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Herbal preparations of the pseudostelis plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
